title: LowoFault DEFINITIVE 16x
description: LowoFault DEFINITIVE is the definitive version of my LowoFault series (unreleased). A completely custom blue-themed PvP texture pack, created from scratch. I used my very own palette based on Chr7st and Minecraft Default.
body:
LowoFault DEFINITIVE is the definitive version of my LowoFault series (unreleased). A completely custom blue-themed PvP texture pack, created from scratch. I used my very own palette based on Chr7st and Minecraft Default. This pack offers a clean and modern version of my pack style.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Ms8rb7o4UEs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Featuring:

*   Custom short swords (each one has its own look)
*   Custom pearls, gaps, fire charge, and other PvP items
   
  ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1387647/description_51e4f769-f884-49de-8561-22611563237f.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1387647/description_b967e98b-52c2-4038-9466-c5e50e9dfcbd.png)
*   A clean galaxy sky
  
  ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1387647/description_796324c9-aa65-49ab-94e4-427211dca25f.png)
*   New textures for items, blocks, and the UI
  
  ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1387647/description_80d7932d-3bb5-4a4c-95d4-9e0a8a3651b9.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1387647/description_4cd9a075-cde2-4a8a-ac7c-31d014264da1.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1387647/description_ce26ef5f-0b8b-4ac1-8dd2-0a9975e9ddc7.png)
*   Smooth armor textures
  
  ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1387647/description_dde28a37-8247-4a2f-9c6a-9ceab2debc47.png)
*   Custom hit particles
   
  ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1387647/description_8ce3e503-cbc4-4dc7-8e61-40baa160ffa7.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1387647/description_3696f758-4c0f-4708-ae8e-6acf9424bf97.png)
*   Visual indicator for bow and fishing rod
  
  ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1387647/description_cb3330dd-f143-4931-a399-e576b588fc03.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1387647/description_f486a8ca-27e9-4f0f-9f17-127fc7457719.png)
*   Sleek hotbar with my custom hearts
  
  ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1387647/description_3808ebca-71a4-41ef-9db4-2008fbbe0b9a.png)
*   CHECK IT OUT FOR YOURSELF!! :D

This is my final LowoFault pack, the version that represents my style, my work, and my name.

Feel free to support me on my YouTube channel!!

[https://www.youtube.com/@Lowo404](https://www.youtube.com/@Lowo404)

Bedrock: https://mcpedl.com/lowofault-definitive-16x/
